number_of_cigarettes.value: Number of cigarettes smoked by the smokers living with the nonsmokers (groups as given in Matsukura et al., 1984 table)
number_of_cigarettes.description: Grouping variable representing the number of cigarettes smoked by the cohabitant smoker; used as the independent/trend variable in the analysis of trend.

urinary_cotinine_levels.value: Urinary cotinine excretion levels measured in nonsmokers (summary statistics as given in Matsukura et al., 1984 table)
urinary_cotinine_levels.description: Urinary cotinine excretion measured in nonsmokers who lived with smokers; the dependent variable examined for a systematic relation with number of cigarettes.
